# Walz Travels

> Walz Travels is a premium travel agency and visa consultancy serving the African diaspora across Canada, United Kingdom, UAE, Nigeria and Ghana. Expert visa processing, flight bookings, hotels, private tours, and AI-assisted trip planning.

## Core Services

- [Visa Services](https://www.walztravels.com/visa): Visa processing for UK, Canada, UAE, Schengen, USA and 190+ destinations
- [Flight Bookings](https://www.walztravels.com/flights): 900+ airlines, business to economy, real-time fares and instant ticketing
- [Hotel Reservations](https://www.walztravels.com/hotels): 500,000+ properties worldwide with best-rate guarantee
- [Private Tours](https://www.walztravels.com/tours): Curated tours in Niagara Falls, London, Dubai, Paris and Dublin
- [Travel Insurance](https://www.walztravels.com/insurance): Comprehensive travel shield — medical, cancellation and baggage cover
- [Airport Transfers](https://www.walztravels.com/transfers): Private airport transfers worldwide, available 24/7
- [eSIM](https://www.walztravels.com/esim): Jade Connect eSIM for 150+ countries
- [Trip Planner](https://www.walztravels.com/advisor): AI-assisted trip planning with Jade

## Visa Information

- [UK Visa](https://www.walztravels.com/visa/uk): UK visa requirements, fees and processing times — from USD $188
- [Canada Visa](https://www.walztravels.com/visa/canada): Canada visa requirements and processing — from USD $281
- [UAE Visa](https://www.walztravels.com/visa/uae): UAE visa — from USD $470
- [Schengen Visa](https://www.walztravels.com/visa/schengen): Schengen area visa covering 29 countries — from USD $231
- [USA Visa](https://www.walztravels.com/visa/usa): US visa — from USD $344
- [Apply for Visa](https://www.walztravels.com/visa/apply/uk): Start a visa application online

## Popular Destinations

- [Lagos to London Flights](https://www.walztravels.com/flights/los-lhr): Direct and connecting flights LOS–LHR
- [Accra to London Flights](https://www.walztravels.com/flights/acc-lhr): Flights ACC–LHR
- [Lagos to Dubai Flights](https://www.walztravels.com/flights/los-dxb): Flights LOS–DXB

## Information

- [About Us](https://www.walztravels.com/about): About Walz Travels — incorporated in Ontario, Canada; founded by Olawale Seyi Omobobola
- [Help Centre](https://www.walztravels.com/help): FAQs, support and contact information
- [Blog](https://www.walztravels.com/blog): Travel tips, visa guides and destination inspiration
- [Currency Converter](https://www.walztravels.com/currency): Live currency conversion for travel budgeting
- [Client Portal](https://www.walztravels.com/portal/login): Existing clients — track applications and view bookings
